name: Crusty Pizza Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the yeast in warm water using a warmed bowl.
2. Add salt, olive oil, and 2 1/2 cups flour to the bowl.
3. Attach the dough hook and mix on speed 2 for 2 minutes.
4. Continue mixing on speed 2, adding remaining flour (half cup at a time) until the dough clings to the hook and cleans the side of the bowl.
5. Mix on speed 2 for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Place the dough in a greased bowl, turning to grease the top.
7. Cover and let rise in a warm place, free from drafts, until doubled in bulk (about 1 hour).
8. Punch down the dough.
9. Brush a 14-inch pizza pan with oil and sprinkle with cornmeal.
10. Press the dough evenly across the bottom of the pan, forming a collar around the edge to hold the filling.
11. Add desired toppings.
12. Bake at 450°F for 15 to 20 minutes.
Yield: One 14-inch pizza.
